brief_notes: Fly connectome analysis paper. Key numbers verified: 127,978 neurons, 2,613,129 connections, 93.3% SCC, 98.8% WCC, 20.5 avg degree, Pearson R=0.76 p<0.001, 71% connections within 50 microns, 61.2% of visits to 3% of neurons, 40,218 rich club neurons (~30%), 84% intrinsic, 87% synapse accuracy, 94% per-neuron, 12.1% reciprocal pairs inter-neuropil, 54% GABAergic NSRNs, 12%/6% hemisphere crossing. 4 figures, 3 tables. Well-structured.
